response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable individual contributor with 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience and genuine developer-tooling exposure — CI/CD setup, test automation frameworks, and MCP code generators — but this role is fundamentally a people management position. The resume contains no evidence of managing engineers, conducting performance reviews, running 1:1s, or setting team-level performance expectations. Staff Software Engineer titles and a solo-founder side project do not substitute for the 2+ years of explicit people leadership the role requires as a minimum. The absence of organizational change leadership and limited large-scale mobile-platform ecosystem experience further widen the gap.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains demonstrating technical range
Hands-on developer-tooling work including CI/CD pipeline setup, open-source test automation frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and community open-source projects signaling technical mentorship instincts
concerns: No evidence of direct people management — no mention of managing engineers, headcount ownership, performance cycles, or team hiring
No signal of strategic roadmap ownership, OKR-level planning, or leading organizational change at any employer
Limited exposure to large-scale mobile platform build systems or testing infrastructure at the ecosystem scale described in the role

key_factors.factor: No strategic or organizational leadership scope
Developer tooling and test automation background
